inputs.label: Initial Velocity
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the ball as it leaves the bat.

businessContext_i18n.en: Speed of the ball as it leaves the bat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschwindigkeit des Balls beim Verlassen des Schlägers
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de la balle à la sortie de la batte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de la pelota al salir del bate.

inputs.label: Launch Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle between the initial trajectory and the horizontal field.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between the initial trajectory and the horizontal field.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk yörünge ile yatay alan arasındaki açı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel zwischen der Anfangsflugbahn und der horizontalen Spielfläche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle entre la trajectoire initiale et le champ horizontal.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo entre la trayectoria inicial y el campo horizontal.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الزاوية بين المسار الأولي والمستوى الأفقي.

inputs.label: Initial Height
inputs.businessContext: Height above ground at which the ball is hit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height above ground at which the ball is hit.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe über dem Boden, in der der Ball getroffen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur au-dessus du sol à laquelle la balle est frappée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura sobre el suelo a la que se golpea la pelota.

inputs.label: Gravity
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity (9.81 m/s² on Earth).
